title: The Slender Thread
actors: Sidney Poitier, Anne Bancroft, Telly Savalas
plot: College volunteer Alan Newell is working alone at the crisis center one evening when he receives a telephone call from suicidal caller Inga Dyson, who has swallowed a bottle of sleeping pills. Can Alan save her?
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 4 nominations total
